title: Background Characteristics
description: Percent distribution of women aged 15-49 by age, education, marital status, religion, residence, and wealth quintile (NDHS 2025)

title: Antenatal Care
description: Maternal care by region: antenatal care coverage, ANC visits, iron supplementation, and neonatal tetanus protection (NDHS 2025)

title: Postnatal Check
description: Percentage of women with a postnatal check during the first 2 days after birth, by region (NDHS 2025)

title: Birth Delivery
description: Maternal care by region: skilled attendance at delivery, facility delivery, and caesarean section (NDHS 2025)

title: Current Use of Contraception Among All Women
description: Contraception by region among all women: any method, any modern method, any traditional method, and not currently using (NDHS 2025)

title: Modern Current Use of Contraception Among All Women
description: Modern contraception by region among all women: any modern method and specific modern methods (NDHS 2025)

title: Traditional Current Use of Contraception Among All Women
description: Traditional contraception by region among all women: any traditional method, calendar/rhythm, withdrawal, and other traditional methods (NDHS 2025)

title: Current Use of Contraception Among Married and Sexually Active Women
description: Contraception among currently married women by region, with data tables for currently married and sexually active unmarried women (NDHS 2025)

title: Modern Current Use of Contraception Among Married and Sexually Active Women
description: Modern contraception among currently married women by region, with data tables for currently married and sexually active unmarried women (NDHS 2025)

title: Traditional Current Use of Contraception Among Married and Sexually Active Women
description: Traditional contraception among currently married women by region, with data tables for currently married and sexually active unmarried women (NDHS 2025)

title: Source of Modern Contraception Methods
description: Most recent source of modern contraceptive methods among users aged 15 to 49 years, by method (NDHS 2025)

title: Family Planning Among All Women
description: Need and demand for family planning among all women aged 15 to 49 years by background characteristics (NDHS 2025)

title: Family Planning Among Married and Sexually Active Women
description: Need and demand for family planning among currently married and sexually active unmarried women aged 15 to 49 years by background characteristics (NDHS 2025)

title: Early Childhood Mortality Rates
description: Neonatal, post-neonatal, infant, child and under-5 mortality rates for 5-year periods preceding the survey: Philippines, 2022 and 2025 (NDHS 2025)

title: Five-Year Early Childhood Mortality Rates
description: Neonatal, post-neonatal, infant, child, and under-5 mortality rates for the 5-year period preceding the survey by background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025 (NDHS 2025)

title: Ten-Year Early Childhood Mortality Rates
description: Neonatal, post-neonatal, infant, child, and under-5 mortality rates for the ten-year period preceding the survey by additional characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025 (NDHS 2025)

title: Fertility Preferences
description: Desire for children by region: want no more, timing preferences, sterilization, and declared infecundity (NDHS 2025)

title: Desire to Limit Childbearing
description: Want no more children or sterilized by region and number of living children (NDHS 2025)

title: Total Fertility Rate
description: Total fertility rate by region (NDHS 2025)

title: Teenage Pregnancy
description: Percentage of women aged 15-19 who have ever been pregnant, by region (NDHS 2025)

title: Children Aged 12 to 23 Months - Vaccination Status
description: Vaccination status among children aged 12 to 23 months by background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025.

title: Children Aged 12 to 23 Months - BCG, HepB (birth dose), MMR 1
description: BCG, HepB birth dose, and MMR 1 coverage among children aged 12 to 23 months by background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025.

title: Children Aged 12 to 23 Months - Polio Vaccinations
description: OPV, IPV, and Polio 3 coverage among children aged 12 to 23 months by background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025.

title: Children Aged 12 to 23 Months - PCV Vaccinations
description: PCV dose coverage among children aged 12 to 23 months by background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025.

title: Children Aged 24 to 35 Months - MMR 2 and Full Vaccination Schedule
description: MMR 2 and full schedule vaccination among children aged 24 to 35 months by background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025.

title: Results of the Household and Individual Interviews
description: Number of households, number of interviews, and response rates, according to residence (unweighted): Philippines, 2025.

title: Child Discipline
description: Percentage of children aged 1 to 14 years by child disciplining methods experienced during the last one month, according to background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025

title: Attitudes Toward Physical Punishment
description: Among households with a child aged 1 to 14 years, percentage of household respondents who believe that physical punishment is needed to bring up, raise, or educate a child properly, according to background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025
